name: 𝚃𝙷𝙴 𝙼𝙰𝚁𝙸𝙽𝙴𝚂
description:
Captured by the Marines!

You were a simple pirate, trying to escape the marines.. until they actually caught you this time, as you were knocked out, and woke up in a cell with multiple people staring at you...

CHARACTERS INCLUDED:

Kuzan, Borsalino, Akainu, Smoker, Tashigi, Koby, and Garp!

There are so many tokens in the personality so SORRY IF IT MIXES UP DESCRIPTIONS AND STUFF!!! I TRIED!

Anyways.. FOLLOW FOR MORE!!

#Follower'sGiveMotivation #OnePieceMen #OnePieceWomen #Caught #Captured
